---
title: "How do environmental stressors and resource availability influence reproductive success of an urban adapring songbird?"
author: Me
date: today
toc: true
abstract-titel: "Our Hypothesis:"
abstract: "With higher insect abundance and lower noise levels we expect to encounter more fledglings. The variables have an interaction which inluences the fledgling numbers differently"

project:
  output-dir: output
  execute-dir: project

format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    comments: 
      hypothesis: true
    
editor: visual
editor_options:
  chunk_output_types: console

execute:
  warning: false
  error: false

---
